connectorUiConfig.title: OpenAI (via Codeless Connector Framework)
connectorUiConfig.descriptionMarkdown: The OpenAI data connector enables you to ingest audit logs, chat completion data, or both from your OpenAI organization into Microsoft Sentinel through the OpenAI API. Each data type uses a separate REST API poller and requires a different API key type: **audit logs** (user actions, API key management, organization changes, security events) require an **organization-level admin API key**, while **chat completions** (model usage, token consumption, performance metrics) require a **project-level API key**. You may configure one or both data types independently. Data is collected into separate tables (OpenAIAuditLogs and OpenAIChatCompletions) for security monitoring, compliance analysis, and usage monitoring. Refer to [OpenAI API documentation](https://platform.openai.com/docs/api-reference) for more information.

dataTypes.name: OpenAIAuditLogs
dataTypes.lastDataReceivedQuery:
OpenAIAuditLogs
| where TimeGenerated > ago(6h)
| summarize Time = max(TimeGenerated)
| where isnotempty(Time)

dataTypes.name: OpenAIChatCompletions
dataTypes.lastDataReceivedQuery:
OpenAIChatCompletions
| where TimeGenerated > ago(6h)
| summarize Time = max(TimeGenerated)
| where isnotempty(Time)

value: union OpenAIAuditLogs, OpenAIChatCompletions | where TimeGenerated > ago(1h) | take 1

resourceProvider.permissionsDisplayText: Read and Write permissions are required.

customs.name: OpenAI API access
customs.description: Each data type requires a different API key type. An **organization-level admin API key** is required for audit logs - these can be created in your OpenAI organization settings. A **project-level API key** is required for chat completions - these can be created under a specific project in the OpenAI dashboard. You may configure audit logs, chat completions, or both independently.

instructionSteps.title: Connection Information
instructionSteps.description: Details on the connections used to collect data from OpenAI's API.

parameters.content:
- **Audit Logs** (`OpenAIAuditLogs`):
    - Use **organization-level admin API keys**.
    - Audit logging must be enabled in your OpenAI organization settings. Organization owners can go to OpenAI's `Organization settings` -> `Data controls` -> `Data retention` to enable audit logging.
    - Once OpenAI audit logging is enabled, it cannot be disabled without contacting OpenAI support.
- **Chat Completions** (`OpenAIChatCompletions`):
    - Use **project-level API keys**.
    - Only chat completions created with the `store` parameter set to `true` will be collected.
    - Deleting stored chat completions while this connector is active may require you to disconnect and reconnect to reset the data collection state.

instructionSteps.title: Add OpenAI Audit Logs Connection
instructionSteps.description: Enter your OpenAI API credentials to collect audit logs data from OpenAI API.

parameters.label: Add Connection
parameters.title: Add OpenAI Audit Logs Connection
parameters.subtitle: Connect to OpenAI Audit Logs API

parameters.content:
## OpenAI Audit Logs Connection

Configure your OpenAI organization-level admin API key to collect audit logs (user actions, API key management, organization changes, security events).

> **Note:** Audit logs require an **organization-level admin API key**. These can be created in your OpenAI organization settings.

parameters.label: Audit Logs Connection Name
parameters.placeholder: e.g. My OpenAI Org - Audit Logs
parameters.name: auditLogsFriendlyName

parameters.label: Organization API Key
parameters.placeholder: Enter your OpenAI organization-level admin API key
parameters.name: orgApiKey

instructionSteps.title: Add OpenAI Chat Completions Connection
instructionSteps.description: Enter your OpenAI API credentials to collect chat completions data from OpenAI API.

parameters.label: Add Connection
parameters.title: Add OpenAI Chat Completions Connection
parameters.subtitle: Connect to OpenAI Chat Completions API

parameters.content:
## OpenAI Chat Completions Connection

Configure your OpenAI project-level API key to collect chat completions data (model usage, token consumption, performance metrics).

> **Note:** Chat completions require a **project-level API key**. These can be created under a specific project in the OpenAI dashboard. Only chat completions created with the `store` parameter set to `true` will be collected.

parameters.label: Chat Completions Connection Name
parameters.placeholder: e.g. My OpenAI Project - Chat Completions
parameters.name: chatCompletionsFriendlyName

parameters.label: Project API Key
parameters.placeholder: Enter your OpenAI project-level API key
parameters.name: projApiKey
